title: Rollins (ROL) Up 9.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Rollins (ROL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Wall Street Analysts Believe Rollins (ROL) Could Rally 28%: Here's is How to Trade
text: The mean of analysts' price targets for Rollins (ROL) points to a 27.6% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For February 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of February. Last month's list returned -4.01% in January and starts out the year on a sour note; however, it performed better than both VIG and SPY.
